description_long: This object is a long, slender firearm-like tool with a wooden stock and fore-end, a black metallic barrel, and a black butt plate. The stock is angular and tapers toward the rear, while the barrel is cylindrical and extends straight from the main body. The trigger and trigger guard are visible beneath the main body, and the overall design is simple and utilitarian, lacking any visible ornamentation. The coloration is primarily a light brown wood with contrasting black metal components. The object appears robust and functional, suitable for use in rugged environments. There are no visible engravings, inlays, or decorative features.
description: A long, slender object with a wooden stock and black metal barrel, resembling a simple, utilitarian firearm.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the wooden stock, black barrel, and butt plate.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the narrow, cylindrical barrel and the slim profile of the stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the stock and barrel features with the trigger and guard visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the width of the butt plate and the alignment of the stock and barrel.
attribute_handle_design: angular wooden handle with black butt plate, straight and unadorned
